testcase.name: test_vram

failure.message: AssertionError: Torch not compiled with CUDA enabled

testcase.failure: test_vram.py:27: in test_vram engine = CorridorKeyEngine( CorridorKeyModule\inference_engine.py:37: in __init__ self.mean = torch.tensor([0.485, 0.456, 0.406], dtype=model_precision, device=self.device) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\venvs\CorridorKey\Lib\site-packages\torch\cuda\__init__.py:403: in _lazy_init raise AssertionError("Torch not compiled with CUDA enabled") E AssertionError: Torch not compiled with CUDA enabled

testcase.name: test_videomama_exr_gamma_handling

failure.message: cv2.error: OpenCV(4.13.0) D:\a\opencv-python\opencv-python\opencv\modules\imgcodecs\src\grfmt_exr.cpp:103: error: (-213:The function/feature is not implemented) imgcodecs: OpenEXR codec is disabled. You can enable it via 'OPENCV_IO_ENABLE_OPENEXR' option. Refer for details and cautions here: https://github.com/opencv/opencv/issues/21326 in function 'cv::initOpenEXR'

testcase.failure: tests\test_clip_manager.py:506: in test_videomama_exr_gamma_handling cv2.imwrite(exr_file, img) E cv2.error: OpenCV(4.13.0) D:\a\opencv-python\opencv-python\opencv\modules\imgcodecs\src\grfmt_exr.cpp:103: error: (-213:The function/feature is not implemented) imgcodecs: OpenEXR codec is disabled. testcase.name: test_output_keys[True-openCV]
testcase.failure: tests\test_inference_engine.py:64: in test_output_keys result = engine.process_frame(sample_frame_rgb, sample_mask, post_process_on_gpu=backend == "torch")[0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\venvs\CorridorKey\Lib\site-packages\torch\utils\_contextlib.py:120: in decorate_context return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ CorridorKeyModule\inference_engine.py:345: in process_frame self._postprocess_opencv( CorridorKeyModule\inference_engine.py:177: in _postprocess_opencv res_alpha = pred_alpha.permute(1, 2, 0).cpu().numpy() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'numpy.ndarray' object has no attribute 'permute'

testcase.name: test_mask_2d_vs_3d_input[True-torch]

failure.message: RuntimeError: Tensors must have same number of dimensions: got 4 and 5

testcase.failure: tests\test_inference_engine.py:340: in test_mask_2d_vs_3d_input result_3d = engine.process_frame(sample_frame_rgb, mask_3d, post_process_on_gpu=backend == "torch")[0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ..\..\venvs\CorridorKey\Lib\site-packages\torch\utils\_contextlib.py:120: in decorate_context return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ CorridorKeyModule\inference_engine.py:325: in process_frame inp_t = self._preprocess_input(img_t, msk_t, input_is_linear) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ CorridorKeyModule\inference_engine.py:159: in _preprocess_input inp_concat = torch.concat((image_batch, mask_batch_linear), -3) # [4, H, W] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: Tensors must have same number of dimensions: got 4 and 5
